params.sizeDelta: Positive = more long, Negative = more short (18-dec) Callers MUST send ETH/BNB with this call if they want to deposit margin. If sizeDelta reduces/closes a position, the released margin is refunded.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

liquidate(bytes32,address).notice: Liquidate an undercollateralized position.         Liquidators receive a 1% incentive from the seized margin.

modifyPosition(bytes32,int256).notice: Open or modify a position using native ETH/BNB as margin.

withdrawInsuranceFund(address,uint256).notice: Admin: withdraw from insurance fund to treasury.

withdrawMargin(bytes32,uint256).notice: Withdraw margin from an open position (partial deleverage / margin withdrawal).

mapping(bytes32 => mapping(address => struct AgentPerpEngineNative.Position storage ref))

documentation.text: @notice Withdraw margin from an open position (partial deleverage / margin withdrawal).
